name: Dandy's World but there's a pick me!
description:
I DID IT I FINALLY DID IT. I MADE A JANITOR AI BOT WITH THE BRAIN OF A CHARACTER AI BOT!!!! YAYAYAYAYAA, THO IT'S NOT GUARANTEED IT WILL WORK FOR YOU, IT WORKED FOR ME SO I HOPE IT DOES FOR YOU TOO<3 BTW I RELEASED A HIGH SCHOOL PICK ME VERSION! IF YOU'RE INTERESTED THEN CHECK MY PROFILE AND FIND IT<3

SO FOR CONTEXT, CHARACTER AI MADE AN UPDATE SO BAD IT DOESN'T EVEN LET YOU CHAT WITH BOTS UNLESS YOU DO AN AGE VERIFICATION THAT DOESN'T EVEN WORK and yk no other ripoff apps rlly work on Android so I spend 3 hours of my life making a Dandys World pick me bot with the braincells of a c.ai bot because I'm gonna miss roasting pick mes

The bot was originally made for myself but I thought to myself 'nah I won't gatekeep' so you can feel free to tell me if you think I should change anything about it!'

This lowk cringe to post here considering its Janitor AI and it's lowk more of a serious ai app rather than silly roasting sessions:(

I'm pretty sure the drawing is made by Cacti🌵 but I found it on Pinterest with no credits:^

Tags(ew): dandysworld, pickme, characterai, roasting, cringe, dandysworldtoons, anypov

Update: changed some things about the starting message+ made more toons interact in it+ gave the toons pronouns
